name: @moneyworks/canonical
description: Pure MoneyWorks canonical types, enums, and business logic - zero contamination from business domains
overview: The canonical package is the foundation of MoneyWorks semantic accuracy. It contains ONLY pure MoneyWorks types, terminology, and logic directly from the MoneyWorks manual. This package ensures that MoneyWorks' specific DSL (Domain Specific Language) is preserved throughout the system without contamination from generic business terms.

exports.name: Common Types
exports.description: Core MoneyWorks data types and validation interfaces used across all entities

items.name: MoneyWorksDataType
items.signature: enum MoneyWorksDataType { TEXT = 'T', NUMERIC = 'N', DATE = 'D', BOOLEAN = 'B', TIMESTAMP = 'S', ENUMERATED = 'E' }
items.description: MoneyWorks field data types using single-letter codes from the manual
items.example:
const fieldType = MoneyWorksDataType.TEXT; // 'T'
const isNumeric = fieldType === MoneyWorksDataType.NUMERIC;

items.name: MoneyWorksFieldMetadata
items.description: Metadata structure for MoneyWorks fields including type, constraints, and documentation

items.name: MoneyWorksValidationResult
items.description: Standard validation result structure for all MoneyWorks canonical validation

items.name: MoneyWorksBusinessRules
items.description: Base interface for entity-specific MoneyWorks business rules

items.name: MoneyWorksFieldRelationship
items.description: Defines relationships between MoneyWorks entities using MW terminology

exports.name: TaxRates Namespace
exports.description: Complete tax rate management with MoneyWorks-specific types, validation, and calculations

items.name: MoneyWorksTaxRate
items.description: Complete MoneyWorks tax rate entity with all fields from the manual. Uses GST terminology for all tax types.

items.name: MoneyWorksTaxCombineMode
items.signature:
enum MoneyWorksTaxCombineMode {
  NO_SECOND_TIER = 0,
  ADD_BEFORE = 1,
  SUBTRACT_BEFORE = 2,
  ADD_AFTER = 3,
  SUBTRACT_AFTER = 4
}
items.description: How second-tier tax (PST) combines with GST in MoneyWorks tax calculations

items.name: MoneyWorksTaxFinalizationStatus
items.description: GST finalization status for Australian/NZ BAS processing

items.name: validateTaxCode
items.description: Validates a MoneyWorks TaxCode according to MW rules (max 5 chars, alphanumeric)

items.name: validateTaxRate
items.description: Validates a complete MoneyWorks tax rate entity including required fields and business rules

items.name: getCurrentTaxRate
items.description: Gets the active tax rate (Rate1 or Rate2) based on changeover date logic

items.name: calculateTaxForRate
items.signature: (taxRate: MoneyWorksTaxRate, amount: number, context: TaxCalculationContext) => TaxCalculationResult
items.description: Calculates tax for a single rate with full MoneyWorks business logic including rounding

items.name: calculateCombinedTax
items.signature: (tier1: MoneyWorksTaxRate, tier2: MoneyWorksTaxRate, amount: number, context: TaxCalculationContext) => CombinedTaxResult
items.description: Calculates combined tax for MoneyWorks two-tier tax system (e.g., Canadian GST+PST)

items.name: getFieldMetadata
items.description: Gets complete metadata for a specific tax rate field including type and constraints

items.name: MONEYWORKS_TAX_RATE_FIELDS
items.description: Complete field definitions for all MoneyWorks tax rate fields

exports.name: Package Constants
exports.description: Version and status information for the canonical package

items.name: CANONICAL_VERSION
items.description: Version information tracking which MoneyWorks manual version was used and entity completion status

examples.title: Basic Tax Rate Validation
examples.description: Validate a tax rate using MoneyWorks canonical rules

examples.title: Tax Calculation with Changeover Date
examples.description: Calculate tax using the correct rate based on transaction date

examples.title: Canadian GST+PST Calculation
examples.description: Calculate combined federal and provincial taxes

examples.title: Field Metadata Access
examples.description: Access MoneyWorks field definitions and constraints

importPatterns.description: Import the TaxRates namespace for all tax-related functionality
Import common types used across all entities
Direct import of specific types (not recommended - use namespace imports instead)

designPrinciples.description: Every type, field name, and enum value comes directly from the MoneyWorks manual. No business domain contamination.
GST is used for all tax types (including VAT, sales tax). TaxCode not tax_id. PaidAccount not tax_payable.
Full TypeScript types with branded types from utilities package (YYYYMMDD, AccountCode, etc.)
Every field includes its source page in the MoneyWorks manual for verification.
Only depends on @moneyworks/utilities for branded types. No external dependencies.

futurePlans.description: Complete transaction types including invoices, bills, receipts, and payments
Chart of accounts with account types, categories, and hierarchies
Customer and supplier records with contact details and terms
Inventory items with pricing, stock levels, and categories
